results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board
Federal Reserve Board - Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end

summary_extracted: FOMC held rates at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026 — markets priced 100% hold. Four dissents, largest since October 1992: three wanted to drop future-cut language, one (Trump appointee Miran) wanted an immediate cut. Powell announced he will remain on the Fed Board after his chair term ends. Inflation elevated partly from Middle East energy shock. Leadership transition uncertainty ongoing.
